findings.evidence: `rg "eq_neg_four_of_primeDiscriminantRadicand_natAbs_eq_one|primeDiscriminantRadicand.*natAbs" code/TauCeti mathlib/Mathlib` finds the declaration at line 60 and only its internal use at line 125; the file’s public main-results list names only coprimality, square-class independence, and the finrank corollary.
findings.fix: Make this theorem `private`, or move a deliberately public characteristic `iff` form into `PrimeDiscriminants.lean` if downstream users are meant to rely on it.
findings.issue: `eq_neg_four_of_primeDiscriminantRadicand_natAbs_eq_one` is a public theorem even though it is only used internally to prove the subset-product theorem and is not part of the named genus-field independence API.

summary: The main independence and degree surface is present, but the PR also exposes an implementation-only helper outside the stated downstream API.
